reviews.review_description: I bought this app a long time ago. All the puzzles worked originally. I do believe there was a working mr mode as well butI can't be 100% sure. I just reloaded the app today and discovered that many of the puzzles are no longer downloadable. The dev needs to fix this so that we get the original puzzles to be accessible again. It was a fun app when it worked.

reviews.review_title: Don’t trust devs, this needs fixing!
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: 9.7.25. Fix this before creating a new almost identical game. Devs, you have a few days to reply to my review of your other title, otherwise i will refund that and the  negative review will be left there. 

Many, including me have issues with this game not including all the promised puzzles. It seems you don’t care as have not replied to anyone in over six months and more importantly haven’t bothered to fix the problem. Take our money and just created a new game. It doesn’t look good, so why should we support your business. We need answers! Please see my other review for artful puzzles for more negative feedback. 

DEVELOPERS THE CLOCK IS TICKING. YOU HAVE UNTIL 12.7.25. IF YOU WANT MY  REVIEW CHANGED AND ME NOT TO REFUND ARTFUL PUZZLE. THE BALL IS IN YOUR COURT! 

————————— 
OLD REVIEW BELOW - gave this four stars. Now needs fixing. 

Update 29.10.24. UPDATE ISSUE FIXED!
Not sure why but couldn’t update my review on here before now. Thanks very much for advice, I waited and undated the app successfully. No issues with that. 

I have one issue now though. I can’t seem to do the latest update. I’ve successfully updated  before. I’ve deleted a load of other games and have well over 40GB free. It can’t be that big surely!? If I  delete it, will I lose my progress? TIA.

The app comes with 2 collections and a total of 13 puzzles. The puzzles are actually quite beautiful. However, it claims to have 50 puzzles. The other collections have a download button, but the puzzles are never downloaded. They also say there is an AR mode, but I cannot find that either. Frankly, I wonder whether the app is still being supported. I will change my rating if these issues are actually fixed. In the meantime, unless you are satisfied with the 13 pictures included, I wouldn't buy this app.

Hi
I start game and two of puzzle categories show pictures  you can choose and play for example 
Renaissance pictures. I download another’s category say gaughin or any other collection and    
It shows download progress and then open, when I click on open only the blurb about artist shows up and piece count you can choose but no actual pictures to play I uninstall and reinstall 
And same results
I hope the developer sees this and responds with an answer of what to do or if anyone knows their email to contact

reviews.review_title: Enjoy this game and love the art
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this beautiful and playful VR game.  
And can we have more if possible 
because to learn more art paintings from this smart educational game play. ✌️👍 . 
Suggestions,  can we have mixed reality pass through gameplay mode.
can we have the frame for the painting as rewards after we finish the piece together. 
Painting look great with the picture frames.  Good idea 💡 
Can we able to import our own paintings into this VR puzzle to solve our own puzzle painting.  Cool idea if possible.  
Thank you.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the feedback! We will be adding mixed reality mode to the game this week and also plan to add more educational information about paintings and artists in future. Thanks for the interesting ideas you described, we'll think about how to optimally implement them.

reviews.review_description: Runs very smoothly and looks good, on Quest 2. The controls could use more polish. For example, grabbing should grab the nearest object if there are multiple objects. And the pieces on the wall are too far away and difficult to grab, because the grab beam is hard to see against the background, and it should have a larger grabbing range, like in Puzzling Places. And snapping pieces together just doesn't feel as good as in Puzzling Places, because there's a delay and less tolerance. Maybe I'll get used to it, I don't know. And the menu is a bit confusing. There are plenty of puzzles.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are actively working on the development of our game. In the coming updates, we will improve some of the things you have described.

reviews.review_description: Im more of an active VR user more focused on shooters and movement apps. However as a once art-student this app not only resulted in a relaxing and entertaining experience but also let me enjoy important pieces of art at a very nice resolution and high detail; I wasn't expecting that and i really enjoyed the experience. Its also a nice and user friendly app that i can share with my family

This is an enjoyable jigsaw app which will I am sure give quite a few hours of enjoyment. 

For 1/4 off simply replace # with a dot.

oculus#com/appreferrals/Goldenlay/5920812271341547/
Beautifully designed with various collections of puzzles, this game delivers smooth controls, stunning graphics, and a calming vibe.
A very pleasant relaxing game, I also loved playing it in AR mode

The game is quite meditative and relaxing. I like to collect puzzles from the Renaissance collection and vases. The Ancient Egyptian puzzles also look very interesting, I quickly completed several on easy difficulty levels.

The game has quite an interesting set of collections with different artists and styles. Collecting puzzles with Van Gogh paintings is a bit difficult, collecting classical artists seemed easier to me. Also an interesting experience in assembling 3d puzzles, this is different from assembling paintings. I liked the choice of different spaces in which you can play.
Pieces of vases look very funny in vr, I liked to collect them. And I also really liked the hexagonal puzzles, they look unusual.
